Apology

Sincere Apology — From Me to You — Card · Soft · Elegant · for Her

You're the last person in the world I ever want to hurt, and I hurt you. That's on me, and I'm really, really sorry. 💙💗✨

Thinking of You

You're On My Mind — Custom Greeting Online · Soft · Romantic · for Hospital

I was gonna wait for a good reason to reach out, but then I realized you are the good reason. Hi, I miss you, let's talk soon. 💙💗✨

🍪 We use cookies
Essential cookies keep the card editor working. Analytics and advertising cookies help us improve the site and show relevant ads, and are only set after you accept. Read the Privacy Policy or Cookie Policy for details.
